[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1000111001 5
2 0101010101 5
3 1010111110 7
4 1101010101 6
5 1101011110 7
6 0111010110 6
7 1011101110 7

01 10 0010000010 2
12 21 0000000000 a
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 0010100000 2
45 54 0000100001 2
56 65 0100100001 3
67 76 0100010001 3
70 07 0101000000 2

02 20 0101000000 2
13 31 0010101010 4
24 42 0000000001 1
35 53 0000101010 3
46 64 0000100001 2
57 75 0100000001 2
60 06 0100000000 1
71 17 0000000000 a

03 30 0010000010 2
14 41 0010100000 2
25 52 0100000001 2
36 63 0000100000 1
47 74 0000000001 1
50 05 0100000010 2
61 16 0000100000 1
72 27 0101000001 3

04 40 0010000000 1
15 51 1000101010 4
26 62 0100000001 2
37 73 0000000000 a
[completion]
0 absent
1 absent
2 absent

4 absent

6 absent
7 absent

none
